title: Craftable Totems
description: Now you can have unlimited lives. Totems are craftable with golden apples.
body:
**Tired of raiding every Woodland Mansion just for a chance at a Totem of Undying?**

This lightweight mod/datapack introduces a lore-friendly, yet challenging, crafting recipe to make the most valuable item in Minecraft renewable for your long-term survival world.

**The Totem of Undying is now craftable using:**
8 Golden Apples: The sweet, life-giving essence of the overworld, representing a significant investment of gold and time.

1 Ghast Tear: A hard-won prize from the Nether, symbolizing a moment of survival and the distilled sadness of the ghast.

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11c7a53631f6e1841a92d9c009409299ff78f0a3.png)

This recipe balances rare and valuable resources from multiple dimensions, ensuring the Totem remains a precious item without being a non-renewable grind. Perfect for builders, redstone engineers, and dedicated survivalists who want a more predictable path to immortality!
